metadata.title: Yoones Zamani — Full Stack Developer | React, Next.js & Node.js
metadata.description: Portfolio of Yoones Zamani, a Full Stack Developer building scalable web apps, modern frontends, and robust backend systems with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. Available for freelance projects.
metadata.ogTitle: Yoones Zamani — Full Stack Web Developer
metadata.ogDescription: Building end-to-end web solutions that scale — from pixel-perfect UIs to production-ready backends.

hero.description: From pixel-perfect frontends to robust backend architectures. I craft complete digital experiences with modern tech stacks and best practices.

terminal.passion: Transforming ideas into production-ready full-stack solutions

about.title: Yoones Zamani
about.description: I craft full-stack applications with the mindset of both an engineer and a product designer building scalable backends, seamless APIs, and responsive interfaces that feel effortless to use. My approach connects robust system architecture with clean, intuitive user experiences, turning complex technical challenges into products people genuinely enjoy interacting with.

contact.description: Looking for a Full-Stack Developer to build scalable web apps, modern frontends, or robust backend systems? Let's build something powerful together.
